headline: Production issue impacting 3% of checkout transactions requires immediate decision; Series B investor meeting rescheduled to 10am Thursday

top_priority.title: Live checkout failures - rollback vs hotfix decision needed
top_priority.summary: Payment service dependency issue is causing intermittent checkout failures for ~3% of users. Engineering needs a decision within the hour: roll back (safer, but 2-week setback) or push a hotfix (faster, but riskier).

sections.title: Investor Relations
sections.summary: Series B due diligence with Meridian Ventures moved to 10am Thursday (from 2pm) to avoid internal meeting conflicts. Revenue projections must be delivered by Wednesday EOD ahead of their partners meeting Monday.

sections.title: Commercial Decisions
sections.summary: Northwind deal structure changed: client wants 1-year term instead of 2-year, dropping ARR from 120k to 60k. Decision needed by EOD on whether to accept or push back.

sections.title: Executive Hiring
sections.summary: VP Engineering shortlist received (4 candidates). Recruiter recommends prioritizing ex-Stripe and ex-Datadog candidates. Intro calls need scheduling for next week.

sections.title: People & Culture
sections.summary: Engineering team grumbling about hybrid policy being introduced without consultation. Benefits package sign-off needed by Friday EOD to lock in rates before March 21st.

sections.title: Resolved Items
sections.summary: Horizon project timeline concern resolved internally - David and Lisa aligned on revised 10-week timeline with phased delivery approach. Board deck review remains on original Thursday schedule as finance can deliver preliminary Q1 numbers by tomorrow.

flags.summary: Live checkout failures affecting 3% of users - executive decision required within the hour
Northwind deal ARR cut in half - 60k at risk if no response by EOD
Benefits package sign-off deadline Friday EOD - rate lock expires March 21st
Engineering morale issue on hybrid policy needs addressing before it escalates

next_actions.action: Make immediate decision on payment service rollback vs hotfix
Decide on Northwind deal counter-proposal by EOD
Confirm Meridian meeting at 10am Thursday and ensure CFO delivers revenue projections by Wednesday
Review and sign off on benefits package by Thursday EOD
Schedule VP Engineering intro calls with top 2 candidates for next week
Brief chat with Alex (Head of People) about hybrid policy feedback
